name: Cheesy Noodle Skillet Supper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground turkey with onion until no longer pink. Drain excess fat.
Add spaghetti sauce and soup; stir to combine. Stir in water. Bring mixture to a boil.
Stir in egg noodles. Return to a boil. Reduce heat to medium. Cover and cook 8 to 10 minutes,
stirring occasionally, or until noodles are tender.
2. Uncover the skillet. Stir in mushrooms. Cook, uncovered, for 2 to 4 minutes, stirring
occasionally, or until sauce reaches desired consistency.
Sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese. Cover and return to a simmer. Cook 1 to 2 minutes,
stirring occasionally, until cheese is melted.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
610 Calories, 32 g Fat, 1430 mg Sodium
